name: Cranberry Sauce W/Pearl Onions and Golden Rai
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pearl onions (blanched in boiling water for 3 minutes, then drained and peeled)
1/2 cup Golden raisins (from a 1 lb bag)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a dry large deep heavy skillet, cook the sugar over moderately high heat, stirring constantly, until completely melted and a deep golden caramel forms.
2. Remove the skillet from the heat. Carefully pour in 1 cup hot water, a little at a time, and continue cooking the mixture over moderate heat, stirring until the caramel is fully dissolved.
3. Add the onions, raisins, and cranberries to the skillet. Simmer the mixture, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes, or until the cranberries are tender.
4. Remove the skillet from the heat and let the cranberry sauce mixture cool. Transfer it to a serving dish.
